These findings reveal a subtle phenomenon: quantum resources that obstruct classical emulation may, paradoxically, enhance the intrinsic robustness of quantum simulation, highlighting a constructive interplay between complexity and stability in quantum computation.
summary: 量子模拟是量子计算的基石应用，但基本的量子资源——纠缠和非稳定性（“魔法”）——如何塑造模拟保真度仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们在这些资源和基于 Trotter-Suzuki 公式的哈密顿模拟中出现的算法错误的统计行为之间建立了严格的联系。通过分析具有固定纠缠熵或魔法的状态系综，我们做出了两个关键发现： Trotter 误差随着纠缠熵的增加而减小，表明纠缠态的误差集中度更强，这意味着具有高魔力的态具有轻尾误差分布，因此出现大偏差的概率降低。这些发现揭示了一个微妙的现象：阻碍经典模拟的量子资源可能会增强量子模拟的内在鲁棒性，凸显量子复杂性和稳定性之间的建设性相互作用。计算。

title: Beyond the Quantum Regression Theorem in Variational Polaron Master Equations with Low-Dimensional Baths
abstract: While the quantum regression theorem (QRT) is the standard tool for computing multi-time correlation functions in open quantum systems, it relies on system-bath separability and an environment that remains in equilibrium, assumptions that are violated once dynamical correlations develop. Using the projection operator formalism, we derive an extension to the QRT that explicitly incorporates these correlation-induced corrections. We apply this framework to the variational polaron master equation for the spin-boson model in ohmic and super-ohmic regimes, where the polaron transformation mixes system-bath degrees of freedom to produce a non-thermal effective environment. Benchmarking against numerically exact tensor-network simulations demonstrates quantitative agreement for single- and two-time observables, including linear-response spectra, even at strong coupling. Our approach broadens the reach of analytic master equations to strong-coupling regimes, enabling treatment of multi-time observables where environmental memory effects and system-bath correlations are crucial.
summary: 虽然量子回归定理 (QRT) 是计算开放量子系统中的多次相关函数的标准工具，但它依赖于系统浴可分离性和保持平衡的环境，一旦动态相关性发展，这些假设就会被违反。使用投影算子形式，我们推导了 QRT 的扩展，它明确地包含了这些相关引起的校正。我们将此框架应用于欧姆和超欧姆体系中自旋玻色子模型的变分极化子主方程，其中极化子变换混合系统浴自由度以产生非热有效环境。针对数值精确张量网络模拟的基准测试表明，即使在强耦合下，单次和两次可观测值（包括线性响应谱）也具有定量一致性。我们的方法将分析主方程的范围扩大到强耦合机制，从而能够处理环境记忆效应和系统浴相关性至关重要的多次可观测值。

title: A $\boldsymbol{2d \times d \times d}$ Spacetime Volume Implementation of a Logical S Gate in the Surface Code
abstract: The logical S gate implemented via twist defect braiding in the surface code is one of the major sources of overhead in fault-tolerant quantum computing, since an S-gate correction is required in every logical T-gate teleportation. Existing logical S-gate implementations require spacetime volumes of \(2d \times 2d \times d\) or \(2d \times 1.5d \times d\), where $d$ is the code distance of the surface code. To the best of our knowledge, their circuit-level implementations have not yet been shown, hindering quantitative comparisons of fault distances and logical error rates. In this work, we provide these missing circuit-level implementations. Additionally, we propose a novel twist defect braiding protocol that reduces the spacetime volume to \(2d \times d \times d\). First, we construct an implementation of the proposed method using constant-length non-local gates, and then refine it to utilize only nearest-neighbor two-qubit gates on a square grid, without requiring additional two-qubit gate depth beyond that of standard syndrome extraction circuits. Through numerical simulations, we evaluate the fault distances and logical error rates for both existing and proposed methods. Our results show that, although the proposed method reduces the fault distance by one or three, its logical error rates remain comparable to those of existing methods at large code distances (\(d \ge 5\)) and at physical error rates near \(p = 10^{-3}\). This demonstrates that the proposed method is promising for near-term fault-tolerant quantum computing.
summary:
通过表面代码中的扭曲缺陷编织实现的逻辑 S 门是容错量子计算中开销的主要来源之一，因为每个逻辑 T 门隐形传态都需要 S 门校正。现有的逻辑 S 门实现需要 \(2d \times 2d \times d\) 或 \(2d \times 1.5d \times d\) 的时空体积，其中 $d$ 是表面代码的代码距离。据我们所知，它们的电路级实现尚未展示，这阻碍了故障距离和逻辑错误率的定量比较。在这项工作中，我们提供了这些缺失的电路级实现。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的扭曲缺陷编织协议，可将时空体积减少到 \(2d \times d \times d\)。首先，我们使用恒定长度非局部门构建所提出方法的实现，然后将其改进为仅利用方形网格上的最近邻两量子位门，而不需要超出标准校正子提取电路的额外两量子位门深度。通过数值模拟，我们评估了现有方法和提出的方法的故障距离和逻辑错误率。

我们的结果表明，尽管所提出的方法将故障距离减少了一到三倍，但其逻辑错误率在大代码距离 (\(d \ge 5\)) 和接近 \(p = 10^{-3}\) 的物理错误率下仍然与现有方法相当。这表明所提出的方法对于近期容错量子计算很有希望。

title: Scalable framework for quantum transport across large physical networks
abstract: Accurately modelling many-body quantum transport systems poses a challenge both conceptually and computationally due to the growth of the Hilbert space and the multi-scale nature of the geometries and couplings present in most naturally occurring networks. A compounding complexity of such systems is that the environment typically plays a key role in the transport dynamics. Utilising variational unitary transformations that displace environmental degrees of freedom allows for the deployment of a second-order master equation capable of capturing the dynamics of intermediate and strongly coupled systems, which are ubiquitous in microscopic energy transport systems. However, direct implementations of this approach suffer from fundamental scalability issues due to the complexity of the self-consistent equations required to solve for the variational parameters. Here, we present an efficient partitioning scheme that leverages the inherent multi-scale nature of natural energy transport networks. This enables scaling of the variational polaron framework to quantum energy transport systems, constituting hundreds to thousands of sites. Our work unlocks the physically motivated exploration of large transport networks, for example, those present within light-harvesting complexes and exciton transport in disordered semiconductors.
summary:
由于希尔伯特空间的增长以及大多数自然发生的网络中存在的几何和耦合的多尺度性质，准确建模多体量子传输系统在概念和计算上都提出了挑战。此类系统的复杂性在于环境通常在运输动态中发挥关键作用。利用取代环境自由度的变分酉变换可以部署二阶主方程，该方程能够捕获中间和强耦合系统的动力学，这些系统在微观能量传输系统中普遍存在。然而，由于求解变分参数所需的自洽方程的复杂性，这种方法的直接实现会遇到基本的可扩展性问题。在这里，我们提出了一种有效的分区方案，利用自然能源传输网络固有的多尺度性质。这使得变分极化子框架能够扩展到量子能量传输系统，构成数百到数千个站点。

我们的工作开启了对大型传输网络的物理驱动探索，例如，光捕获复合体中存在的网络和无序半导体中的激子传输。

title: Manipulation of Superposed Vortex States of $γ$ Photon via Nonlinear Compton Scattering
abstract: Vortex $\gamma$ photons in superposition states have important applications in photonuclear, high-energy, and strong-field physics. However, their controlled generation in the $\gamma$-ray regime remains a great challenge. Here, we put forward a novel method for the generation of vortex $\gamma$ photon in superposition states, with controllable orbital angular momentum (OAM) separation $\Delta\ell^\prime$ and modal weights, via nonlinear Compton scattering driven by multifrequency circularly polarized laser fields. We develop a strong-field quantum electrodynamics (QED) framework to reveal the underlying mechanism and calculate the radiation probabilities. In our method, the superposition arises from interference between energy-degenerate multiphoton pathways carrying distinct OAM. For two-frequency fields, the OAM separation follows $\Delta\ell'=\nu\mp1$ (upper/lower sign for equal/opposite helicities), and modal weights are tunable by laser intensities, with $\nu$ the frequency ratio. Vortex $\gamma$ photons in controllable superposition states from our method have significant applications in strong-field QED and nuclear photonics.
summary: 叠加态的涡旋$\gamma$光子在光核、高能和强场物理中具有重要的应用。然而，它们在$\gamma$射线体系中的受控生成仍然是一个巨大的挑战。在这里，我们提出了一种新方法，通过多频圆偏振激光场驱动的非线性康普顿散射，产生叠加态涡旋 $\gamma$ 光子，具有可控轨道角动量（OAM）分离 $\Delta\ell^\prime$ 和模态权重。我们开发了一个强场量子电动力学（QED）框架来揭示潜在机制并计算辐射概率。在我们的方法中，叠加是由携带不同 OAM 的能量简并多光子路径之间的干扰引起的。对于双频场，OAM 分离遵循 $\Delta\ell'=\nu\mp1$ （相等/相反螺旋的上/下符号），并且模态权重可通过激光强度调节，其中 $\nu$ 是频率比。我们的方法中可控叠加态的涡旋 $\gamma$ 光子在强场 QED 和核光子学中具有重要的应用。

title: Reachability Constraints in Variational Quantum Circuits: Optimization within Polynomial Group Module
abstract: This work identifies a necessary condition for any variational quantum approach to reach the exact ground state. Briefly, the norms of the projections of the input and the ground state onto each group module must match, implying that module weights of the solution state have to be known in advance in order to reach the exact ground state. An exemplary case is provided by matchgate circuits applied to problems whose solutions are classical bit strings, since all computational basis states share the same module-wise weights. Combined with the known classical simulability of quantum circuits for which observables lie in a small linear subspace, this implies that certain problems admit a classical surrogate for exact solution with each step taking $O(n^5)$ time. The Maximum Cut problem serves as an illustrative example.
summary: 这项工作确定了任何变分量子方法达到精确基态的必要条件。简而言之，输入和基态在每个组模块上的投影范数必须匹配，这意味着必须提前知道解状态的模块权重才能达到准确的基态。匹配门电路提供了一个示例性案例，该电路应用于其解决方案是经典位串的问题，因为所有计算基础状态共享相同的模块级权重。结合已知的量子电路的经典可模拟性（可观测量位于一个小的线性子空间中），这意味着某些问题承认精确解决方案的经典替代，每一步都需要 $O(n^5)$ 时间。最大割问题就是一个说明性的例子。

title: Quantum Routing Beyond Pathfinding: Multipartite Entanglement Complementation
abstract: Conventional quantum routing operates under the entrenched assumption that pathfinding is a prerequisite for routing. This classical-inspired routing model imposes a restricting design option, which prevents scaling the quantumness to the network functioning. In this paper, we proposed a novel entanglement-driven routing framework that exploits multipartite entanglement complementation for enabling simultaneous 1-hop connectivity among all non-adjacent source-destination pairs. This changes the notion of ``remoteness'' in the entanglement graph, activated by entanglement. We extend this framework to inter-domain quantum networks and design a polynomial-time algorithm. Such an algorithm allows to select and parallelize multiple requests, bypassing NP-complete path discovery. Performance analysis shows the proposed routing strategy achieves up to $60\%$ hop reduction, with the algorithm enabling efficient parallelism and strong scalability in inter-domain quantum networks.
summary: 传统的量子路由是在寻路是路由的先决条件这一根深蒂固的假设下运行的。这种受经典启发的路由模型施加了限制性的设计选项，这阻止了网络功能的扩展。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的纠缠驱动路由框架，该框架利用多方纠缠互补来实现所有非相邻源-目的地对之间的同步 1 跳连接。这改变了纠缠图中“远程”的概念，由纠缠激活。我们将该框架扩展到域间量子网络并设计了多项式时间算法。这种算法允许选择和并行化多个请求，绕过 NP 完全路径发现。性能分析表明，所提出的路由策略可减少高达 $60\%$ 的跳数，该算法可在域间量子网络中实现高效的并行性和强大的可扩展性。

title: Bipartite entanglement harvesting with multiple detectors
abstract: We study bipartite entanglement harvesting from the quantum vacuum of a massless scalar field between two subsystems, each composed of a finite number of Unruh-DeWitt detectors. Using perturbation theory, we show that the leading-order negativity is fully determined by a submatrix of the reduced density matrix, with the submatrix dimension scaling only linearly with the number of detectors. Within this framework, we analyze how the detectors' spatial arrangement influences harvesting. For all three-detector configurations and several symmetric four-detector configurations, we derive analytic expressions for the negativity and identify the configurations that maximize it. For a linear chain, we find that the harvested entanglement scales linearly with the number of detectors. These results clarify how to arrange multiple detectors to optimize harvesting and show that increasing their number broadens the ranges of energy gaps and separations over which entanglement can be extracted from the field.
summary: 我们研究两个子系统之间无质量标量场的量子真空中的二分纠缠收获，每个子系统由有限数量的 Unruh-DeWitt 探测器组成。使用微扰理论，我们表明前导负性完全由约化密度矩阵的子矩阵决定，子矩阵维度仅与探测器的数量线性缩放。在此框架内，我们分析了探测器的空间布置如何影响采集。对于所有三探测器配置和几种对称四探测器配置，我们推导了负性的解析表达式，并确定了最大化负性的配置。对于线性链，我们发现收获的纠缠与检测器的数量成线性比例。这些结果阐明了如何布置多个探测器来优化收获，并表明增加探测器的数量可以扩大能隙和分离的范围，在这些范围内可以从场中提取纠缠。

title: Experimental realisation of topological spin textures in a Penning trap
abstract: Quantum simulation with controllable many-body platforms offers a powerful route to exploring complex phases and dynamics that are difficult to access in natural materials. Among these, topological spin textures such as skyrmions are central to modern condensed-matter physics and play a key role in chiral quantum many-body systems. Their controlled realisation in large, programmable quantum platforms, however, remains an outstanding challenge. Here, we report deterministic generation and site-resolved reconstruction of topological spin textures in a two-dimensional crystal of more than 150 trapped ions. Using globally applied spin-dependent forces, we generate skyrmion configurations and reconstruct the full vector spin field with single-ion resolution, obtaining a winding number of 0.99$\pm$0.02 and a mean local fidelity of 0.87$\pm$0.04. In addition, we implement single-ion-resolved control to deterministically prepare domain-wall states, extending our approach to a broader class of non-uniform spin textures. These results establish trapped-ion crystals as a platform for engineering complex spin textures and open the door to exploring topology-dependent nonequilibrium dynamics in long-range interacting quantum systems.
summary:
具有可控多体平台的量子模拟为探索天然材料中难以获得的复杂相和动力学提供了强大的途径。其中，斯格明子等拓扑自旋结构是现代凝聚态物理学的核心，并且在手性量子多体系统中发挥着关键作用。然而，它们在大型可编程量子平台中的受控实现仍然是一个突出的挑战。在这里，我们报告了超过 150 个捕获离子的二维晶体中拓扑自旋纹理的确定性生成和位点解析重建。使用全局施加的自旋相关力，我们生成斯格明子构型并以单离子分辨率重建全矢量自旋场，获得 0.99$\pm$0.02 的缠绕数和 0.87$\pm$0.04 的平均局部保真度。此外，我们实现了单离子分辨控制来确定性地准备畴壁状态，将我们的方法扩展到更广泛的非均匀自旋纹理类别。

这些结果将俘获离子晶体建立为工程复杂自旋纹理的平台，并为探索长程相互作用量子系统中依赖于拓扑的非平衡动力学打开了大门。

title: Transient entanglement generation in driven chiral networks beyond the secular approximation
abstract: We study transient entanglement generation between two quantum nodes coupled through a chiral one-dimensional channel. In an emitter-only Born-Markov description, we show that continuous driving and an initial ground state can raise the maximum transient concurrence above the undriven $2/e$ benchmark associated with the effectively single-excitation model. We then consider a more microscopic XX spin-chain channel with triangular plaquette couplings and compare a nonsecular time-convolutionless master equation (TCL-ME) with matrix-product-state (MPS) simulations. In the optimal driven regime, the nonsecular TCL-2 treatment reproduces the concurrence envelope and first transient peak qualitatively, while the remaining discrepancy is mainly attributable to beyond-Born system-bath correlations. The enhancement is traced to the failure of the secular approximation under strong driving, where nearby dressed transitions are not well separated on the dissipative timescale and nonsecular terms mix dressed-state coherences. Finally, we examine within TCL-2 the sensitivity of the protocol to positional disorder, imperfect chirality, and loss into nonguided modes. These results clarify when the familiar $2/e$ limitation ceases to apply and separate the roles of secular breakdown, Born-factorization error, and reduced-state memory in driven chiral entanglement generation; we believe that our study contributes to one of the first studies where the breakdown of the secular approximation is useful rather than detrimental.
summary:
我们研究通过手性一维通道耦合的两个量子节点之间的瞬态纠缠生成。在仅发射极的玻恩-马尔可夫描述中，我们表明连续驱动和初始基态可以将最大瞬态并发提高到与有效单激励模型相关的未驱动 $2/e$ 基准之上。然后，我们考虑具有三角板耦合的更微观的 XX 自旋链通道，并将非世俗时间无卷积主方程 (TCL-ME) 与矩阵乘积状态 (MPS) 模拟进行比较。在最佳驱动方案中，非世俗 TCL-2 处理定性地再现了并发包络和第一个瞬态峰值，而剩余的差异主要归因于出生后系统浴相关性。这种增强可以追溯到强驱动下长期近似的失败，其中附近的穿着过渡在耗散时间尺度上没有很好地分离，并且非长期术语混合了穿着状态相干性。最后，我们在 TCL-2 中检查了协议对位置紊乱、不完美手性和非引导模式丢失的敏感性。

这些结果澄清了熟悉的 $2/e$ 限制何时不再适用，并分离了驱动手性纠缠生成中长期击穿、玻恩因子分解错误和还原状态记忆的作用；我们相信，我们的研究有助于第一个研究，其中长期近似的崩溃是有用的而不是有害的。

title: Wandering range of robust quantum symmetries
abstract: This paper introduces the concept of the wandering range of a robust symmetry $S$ of a Hamiltonian $H$. This quantity measures how the perturbed time evolution $\mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{i}t(H+\varepsilon V)} S \mathrm{e}^{-\mathrm{i} t(H+\varepsilon V)}$ deviates from its unperturbed counterpart $\mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{i} tH} S\mathrm{e}^{-\mathrm{i} tH} = S$. Although the wandering range does not necessarily scale linearly with the perturbation strength $\varepsilon$, we identify conditions under which this linear behavior is recovered and we obtain explicit nonperturbative bounds.
summary: 本文介绍了哈密顿量 $H$ 的鲁棒对称性 $S$ 的漂移范围的概念。该量衡量扰动时间演化 $\mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{i}t(H+\varepsilon V)} S \mathrm{e}^{-\mathrm{i} t(H+\varepsilon V)}$ 与其未扰动对应部分 $\mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{i} tH} 的偏差S\mathrm{e}^{-\mathrm{i} tH} = S$。尽管漂移范围不一定与扰动强度 $\varepsilon$ 成线性比例，但我们确定了恢复这种线性行为的条件，并获得了明确的非扰动边界。

title: Optimally Controlled Storage of a Qubit in an Inhomogeneous Spin Ensemble
abstract: The storage of quantum information in spin-ensembles is limited by practically unavoidable inhomogeneous broadening, and the macroscopic number of spins in such an ensemble makes the design of control solutions to increase the coherence time a challenging task. Together with a concurrently developed Krylov theory that allows us to treat the control problem efficiently, we design optimal cavity modulation for such spin ensembles that achieve an order of magnitude enhancement in qubit lifetime compared to the losses due to inhomogeneity and cavity decay.
summary: 自旋系综中量子信息的存储受到实际上不可避免的不均匀展宽的限制，并且这种系综中的宏观自旋数量使得设计增加相干时间的控制解决方案成为一项具有挑战性的任务。结合同时开发的克雷洛夫理论（使我们能够有效地处理控制问题），我们为这种自旋系综设计了最佳的腔调制，与不均匀性和腔衰减造成的损失相比，量子位寿命实现了一个数量级的增强。

title: Tsallis relative $α$ entropy of coherence dynamics in Grover's search algorithm
abstract: Quantum coherence plays a central role in Grover's search algorithm. We study the Tsallis relative $\alpha$ entropy of coherence dynamics of the evolved state in Grover's search algorithm. We prove that the Tsallis relative $\alpha$ entropy of coherence decreases with the increase of the success probability, and derive the complementarity relations between the coherence and the success probability. We show that the operator coherence of the first $H^{\otimes n}$ relies on the size of the database $N$, the success probability and the target states. Moreover, we illustrate the relationships between coherence and entanglement of the superposition state of targets, as well as the production and deletion of coherence in Grover iterations.
summary: 量子相干性在格罗弗的搜索算法中起着核心作用。我们研究了 Grover 搜索算法中演化态相干动力学的 Tsallis 相对 $\alpha$ 熵。我们证明了相干性的 Tsallis 相对 $\alpha$ 熵随成功概率的增加而减小，并推导了相干性与成功概率之间的互补关系。我们表明，第一个 $H^{\otimes n}$ 的算子一致性取决于数据库 $N$ 的大小、成功概率和目标状态。此外，我们还说明了目标叠加状态的相干性和纠缠之间的关系，以及 Grover 迭代中相干性的产生和删除。

title: Quantum information spreading in inhomogeneous spin ensembles
abstract: We present a Krylov space based theoretical framework for modeling inhomogeneous spin ensembles with arbitrary distributions of spin frequencies and couplings. The framework is then used to asymptotically large spin ensemble. In the single-excitation subspace, the Krylov construction allows for to derive exact expressions for the Lieb-Robinson velocity and quantum speed limit, and figure of merit such as Krylov complexity. Our work reveals a strong dependence of the speed of information flow on the statistical distribution of resonance frequencies in the spin ensemble with immediate implications for the design of components for quantum technologies, realized for example with nitrogen vacancy centers, nuclear spins or ultracold atoms.
summary: 我们提出了基于克雷洛夫空间的理论框架，用于对具有任意自旋频率和耦合分布的非均匀自旋系综进行建模。然后将该框架用于渐近大型自旋系综。在单激发子空间中，Krylov 构造可以导出 Lieb-Robinson 速度和量子速度极限以及 Krylov 复杂度等品质因数的精确表达式。我们的工作揭示了信息流的速度对自旋系综中共振频率的统计分布的强烈依赖性，这对量子技术组件的设计具有直接影响，例如通过氮空位中心、核自旋或超冷原子来实现。

title: A Modular and T-Gate Efficient Architecture for Quantum Leading-Zero/One Counter
abstract: The Quantum Leading-Zero/One Counter (QLZOC) is a fundamental component in quantum arithmetic, playing a critical role in normalization, floating-point units, dynamic range scaling, and logarithmic approximations. Conventional designs primarily rely on direct Boolean-to-quantum mapping, which results in inefficient resource utilization such as irregular gate growth and width-dependent resource overhead. In this work, we propose a scalable, modular, and resource efficient architecture for QLZOC by reformulating the counting process into a sequence of systematic conditional bit-flip operations. Moreover, our design achieves functional polymorphism so that the same design can be easily toggled between zero and one detection, while ensuring seamless scalability to any bit-width without manual re-tuning. We further introduce a Parallel QLZOC (PQLZOC) variant and a Fan-Out optimized (FO-PQLZOC) design. In this work, we evaluate resource efficiency based on the classic criteria about T gates, including the number of total T gates being used (T-count) and the number of sequential T gate layers (T-depth). By exploiting the properties of all-zero/one qubit blocks and a hierarchical merge strategy, the proposed FO-PQLZOC reduces the T-depth from O(m) to O(log m), where m is the input size. Comparative analysis demonstrates that our optimized architecture achieves a 40% reduction in T-count and a 60% reduction in T-depth over state-of-the-art designs, providing a high-performance, T-gate efficient solution for general-purpose quantum arithmetic processors.
summary:
量子前导零/一计数器 (QLZOC) 是量子算术中的基本组件，在归一化、浮点单元、动态范围缩放和对数逼近中发挥着关键作用。传统设计主要依赖于直接布尔到量子映射，这导致资源利用效率低下，例如不规则的门增长和宽度相关的资源开销。在这项工作中，我们通过将计数过程重新表述为一系列系统条件位翻转操作，为 QLZOC 提出了一种可扩展、模块化和资源高效的架构。此外，我们的设计实现了功能多态性，以便相同的设计可以轻松地在零和一次检测之间切换，同时确保无缝可扩展至任何位宽，而无需手动重新调整。我们进一步介绍了并行 QLZOC (PQLZOC) 变体和扇出优化 (FO-PQLZOC) 设计。在这项工作中，我们根据 T 门的经典标准评估资源效率，包括正在使用的总 T 门数量（T 计数）和连续 T 门层数（T 深度）。

通过利用全零/一量子位块的特性和分层合并策略，所提出的 FO-PQLZOC 将 T 深度从 O(m) 减少到 O(log m)，其中 m 是输入大小。对比分析表明，我们的优化架构与最先进的设计相比，T 计数减少了 40%，T 深度减少了 60%，为通用量子算术处理器提供了高性能、T 门高效的解决方案。

title: Dimensioning of Quantum Memories for Distilled Quantum EPR Packets
abstract: The quantum Internet envisions a network where information is transmitted through entanglement, with Einstein-Podolsky-Rosen (EPR) pairs serving as one of the fundamental carriers. In this work, we propose a framework for dimensioning quantum memories capable of storing distilled EPR pairs useful to transmitting and manage quantum error correcting codes. Using a Markov chain model, we capture the stochastic evolution of stored entangled states in quantum memories, linking memory performance to system parameters such as technology characteristics and initial entanglement fidelity. Building on this framework, we provide analytical tools and design principles for optimizing memory architectures that preserve high-fidelity entanglement over time, ensuring the availability of encoded quantum resources necessary for several operations in future quantum Internet infrastructures transmitting EPR packets.
summary: 量子互联网设想了一种通过纠缠传输信息的网络，其中爱因斯坦-波多尔斯基-罗森（EPR）对作为基本载体之一。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个用于确定量子存储器尺寸的框架，该框架能够存储可用于传输和管理量子纠错码的精炼 EPR 对。使用马尔可夫链模型，我们捕获了量子存储器中存储的纠缠态的随机演化，将存储器性能与技术特性和初始纠缠保真度等系统参数联系起来。在此框架的基础上，我们提供了分析工具和设计原则，用于优化内存架构，随着时间的推移保留高保真纠缠，确保未来量子互联网基础设施传输 EPR 数据包的多种操作所需的编码量子资源的可用性。

title: The role of classical periodic orbits in quantum many-body systems
abstract: Semiclassical methods have been applied very successfully to describe the nontrivial transition from the quantum to the classical regime in $\textit{single}$-particle or at least $\textit{few}$-particle systems. Challenges on the way to an extension to $\textit{many}$-body systems result from the exponential proliferation of the number of classical orbits in chaotic systems and the exponential growth of the quantum Hilbert-space dimension with the particle number. To circumvent these problems, we apply here our recently developed duality relation. Considering the kicked spin chain as example for a many-body system, we show how the duality relation can be used to extract the classical orbits from the quantum spectrum. For coupled cat maps, we analyze the spectral statistics of chaotic many-body systems and discuss the double limit of large semiclassical parameter and large particle number.
summary: 半经典方法已被非常成功地应用于描述 $\textit{single}$ 粒子或至少 $\textit{few}$ 粒子系统中从量子到经典状态的非平凡转变。扩展到 $\textit{many}$-body 系统的挑战来自于混沌系统中经典轨道数量的指数级增长以及量子希尔伯特空间维度随粒子数的指数级增长。为了规避这些问题，我们在这里应用我们最近开发的对偶关系。以踢自旋链作为多体系统的示例，我们展示了如何使用对偶关系从量子谱中提取经典轨道。对于耦合猫图，我们分析了混沌多体系统的谱统计，并讨论了大半经典参数和大粒子数的双重极限。

title: From coupled $\mathbb{Z}_3$ Rabi models to the $\mathbb{Z}_3$ Potts model
abstract: We study $\mathbb{Z}_3$-symmetric Rabi model that describes a three-level system coupled to two bosonic modes. We derive a mapping of the two-mode $\mathbb{Z}_3$ Rabi model onto a qubit-boson ring. This mapping allows us to formulate a realistic implementation of the $\mathbb{Z}_3$ Rabi model based on superconducting qubits. It also provides context for the previously proposed optomechanical implementation of the $\mathbb{Z}_3$ Rabi model. In addition, we propose a physical implementation of the $\mathbb{Z}_3$ Potts model via a coupled chain of $\mathbb{Z}_3$ Rabi models.
summary: 我们研究 $\mathbb{Z}_3$-对称 Rabi 模型，该模型描述了与两种玻色子模式耦合的三能级系统。我们推导出二模 $\mathbb{Z}_3$ Rabi 模型到量子比特玻色子环的映射。这种映射使我们能够基于超导量子位制定 $\mathbb{Z}_3$ Rabi 模型的实际实现。它还为之前提出的 $\mathbb{Z}_3$ Rabi 模型的光机械实现提供了背景。此外，我们提出通过 $\mathbb{Z}_3$ Rabi 模型的耦合链来物理实现 $\mathbb{Z}_3$ Potts 模型。

title: Two-Indexed Schatten Quasi-Norms with Applications to Quantum Information Theory
abstract: We define 2-indexed $(q,p)$-Schatten quasi-norms for any $q,p > 0$ on operators on a tensor product of Hilbert spaces, naturally extending the norms defined by Pisier's theory of operator-valued Schatten spaces. We establish several desirable properties of these quasi-norms, such as relational consistency and the behavior on block diagonal operators, assuming that $|\frac{1}{q} - \frac{1}{p}| \leq 1$. In fact, we show that this condition is essentially necessary for natural properties to hold. Furthermore, for linear maps between spaces of such quasi-norms, we introduce completely bounded quasi-norms and co-quasi-norms. We prove that the $q \to p$ completely bounded co-quasi-norm is super-multiplicative for tensor products of quantum channels for $q \geq p>0$, extending an influential result of [Devetak, Junge, King, Ruskai, 2006]. Our proofs rely on elementary matrix analysis and operator convexity tools and do not require operator space theory. On the applications side, we demonstrate that these quasi-norms can be used to express relevant quantum information measures such as Rényi conditional entropies for $\alpha \geq \frac{1}{2}$ or the Sandwiched Rényi Umlaut information for $\alpha < 1$. Our multiplicativity results imply a tensorizing notion of reverse hypercontractivity, additivity of the completely bounded minimum output Rényi-$\alpha$-entropy for $\alpha\geq\frac{1}{2}$ extending another important result of [Devetak, Junge, King, Ruskai, 2006], and additivity of the maximum output Rényi-$\alpha$ entropy for $\alpha \geq \frac{1}{2}$.
summary:
我们为希尔伯特空间张量积上的算子上的任何 $q,p > 0$ 定义 2 索引 $(q,p)$-Schatten 准范数，自然地扩展了 Pisier 算子值 Schatten 空间理论定义的范数。我们建立了这些拟范数的几个理想属性，例如关系一致性和块对角算子的行为，假设 $|\frac{1}{q} - \frac{1}{p}| \leq 1$。事实上，我们证明这个条件对于自然属性的保持本质上是必要的。此外，对于此类拟范数空间之间的线性映射，我们引入了完全有界拟范数和余拟范数。我们证明，$q \to p$ 完全有界余拟范数对于 $q \geq p>0$ 的量子通道张量积是超乘性的，扩展了 [Devetak, Junge, King, Ruskai, 2006] 的有影响力的结果。我们的证明依赖于初等矩阵分析和算子凸性工具，不需要算子空间理论。

在应用方面，我们证明这些准范数可用于表达相关的量子信息度量，例如 $\alpha \geq \frac{1}{2}$ 的 Rényi 条件熵或 $\alpha < 1$ 的夹层 Rényi 变音信息。我们的乘性结果意味着反向超收缩性的张量化概念，$\alpha\geq\frac{1}{2}$ 的完全有界最小输出 Rényi-$\alpha$-熵的可加性，扩展了 [Devetak, Junge, King, Ruskai, 2006] 的另一个重要结果，以及 $\alpha \geq 的最大输出 Rényi-$\alpha$ 熵的可加性\frac{1}{2}$。

title: Distributed quantum-classical hybrid algorithm for solving K-SAT problem
abstract: Recently, Dunjko et al.(PRL, 2018) proposed an algorithm for accelerating the solution of 3-satisfiability problems using a small-scale quantum computer. In this paper, we design a distributed quantum-classical hybrid algorithm for solving K-satisfiability problems. Under resource-constrained conditions, our algorithm achieves a significant acceleration in the core term of the exponential time complexity. The proposed algorithm is a generalization of the algorithm by Dunjko et al. Compared with their algorithm, our algorithm requires a smaller number of qubits. More importantly, the proposed algorithm does not rely on any quantum communication.
summary: 最近，Dunjko 等人（PRL，2018）提出了一种使用小型量子计算机加速解决 3-可满足性问题的算法。在本文中，我们设计了一种分布式量子经典混合算法来解决 K-可满足性问题。在资源受限的条件下，我们的算法在指数时间复杂度的核心项上实现了显着的加速。所提出的算法是 Dunjko 等人算法的推广。与他们的算法相比，我们的算法需要更少数量的量子比特。更重要的是，所提出的算法不依赖于任何量子通信。

title: Hybrid quantum-classical algorithms for complex nonlinear partial differential equations with Ginzburg-Landau potential and vortex motion laws
abstract: We propose quantum algorithms for complex-valued nonlinear partial differential equations in the strongly nonlinear regime, where the dynamics is governed by vortex cores, phase singularities, and nonlinear vortex interactions. Examples include the complex-valued nonlinear Schrödinger equation, as well as nonlinear heat and wave equations with Ginzburg--Landau-type nonlinearity. In the strongly nonlinear regime, the solutions to these equations are asymptotically governed by, in leading order, linear elliptic equations, coupled with low-dimensional vortex dynamics, where the vortex cores correspond to topological defects in superconductors. Our hybrid quantum-classical algorithms utilize this asymptotic property, in which the vortex dynamic is advanced classically while the boundary-value problem of linear elliptic equation is handled by quantum algorithms. For the two-dimensional nonlinear Schrödinger equation, we also combine quantum BPX preconditioning with Schrödingerization to estimate physically relevant observables in the small-output regime. This yields, already in two dimensions, an {\it exponential} improvement in the dependence on the spatial problem size, while the dependence on the target accuracy remains essentially linear up to polylogarithmic factors. We further show that the same principle extends to dissipative Ginzburg--Landau vortex dynamics and to vortex filaments in three-dimensional superconductivity. Numerical results support the validity of this PDE reduction and the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
summary:
我们提出了强非线性区域中复值非线性偏微分方程的量子算法，其中动力学由涡核、相位奇点和非线性涡旋相互作用控制。例子包括复值非线性薛定谔方程，以及具有金兹堡-朗道型非线性的非线性热方程和波动方程。在强非线性区域中，这些方程的解渐近地由线性椭圆方程与低维涡动力学耦合控制，其中涡核对应于超导体中的拓扑缺陷。我们的混合量子经典算法利用了这种渐近性质，其中涡旋动力学是经典先进的，而线性椭圆方程的边值问题是由量子算法处理的。对于二维非线性薛定谔方程，我们还将量子 BPX 预处理与薛定谔化相结合，以估计小输出状态下物理相关的可观测量。

这已经在二维中产生了对空间问题大小的依赖性的指数改善，而对目标精度的依赖性在多对数因子下基本上保持线性。我们进一步表明，同样的原理可以扩展到耗散金兹堡-朗道涡动力学和三维超导中的涡丝。数值结果支持 PDE 降低的有效性以及所提出方法的有效性。

title: Simulating the dynamics of an SU(2) matrix model on a trapped-ion quantum computer
abstract: Matrix models are an important class of systems in string theory and theoretical physics, with applications to random matrix theory, quantum chaos, and black holes. Hamiltonian Monte Carlo simulations and gauge/gravity duality have been used to study these systems at thermal equilibrium, and the bootstrap program has been used to efficiently determine operator expectation values by imposing positivity constraints. However, simulating real-time, non-equilibrium dynamics remains a fundamental challenge. In this work, we present the first digital quantum simulation of a bosonic matrix model, executed on the Quantinuum System Model H2 trapped-ion quantum computer. We focus on an $\mathrm{SU}(2)$ gauge theory with a quartic potential as it is simple enough to validate against exact classical solutions and yet complex enough to reflect the non-local structure of larger theories. Using the Loschmidt echo as our primary dynamical observable, we systematically decompose simulation errors into three distinct sources: Hilbert space truncation, Trotterization, and hardware noise. We demonstrate a new post-selection scheme that detects and discards gauge-symmetry violations in the Fock basis and show that at small scales it, along with zero-noise extrapolation, can give modest improvements in fidelity. These approaches struggle to scale to larger system sizes in their current implementations, emphasizing the need to move beyond them and to focus on depth reduction through improved compilation and unitary synthesis, and run-time error handling such as additional error suppression, error detection, as well as error correction approaches. This work establishes a foundation for extending digital quantum simulation to more complex matrix models -- revealing that fundamental challenges in qubit resources and circuit depth remain formidable obstacles for scaling to holographically interesting regimes.
summary:
矩阵模型是弦理论和理论物理中的一类重要系统，应用于随机矩阵理论、量子混沌和黑洞。哈密​​顿蒙特卡罗模拟和规范/重力对偶性已用于研究这些处于热平衡状态的系统，并且引导程序已用于通过施加正性约束来有效地确定操作员期望值。 However, simulating real-time, non-equilibrium dynamics remains a fundamental challenge.在这项工作中，我们提出了玻色子矩阵模型的第一个数字量子模拟，该模拟在量子系统模型 H2 俘获离子量子计算机上执行。我们关注具有四次势的 $\mathrm{SU}(2)$ 规范理论，因为它足够简单，可以验证精确的经典解，但又足够复杂，可以反映更大理论的非局部结构。使用洛施密特回波作为我们的主要动态可观测值，我们系统地将模拟误差分解为三个不同的来源：希尔伯特空间截断、Trotterization 和硬件噪声。

我们展示了一种新的后选择方案，该方案可以检测并丢弃福克基础中的规范对称性违规，并表明在小规模下，它与零噪声外推一起可以在保真度方面提供适度的改进。这些方法在当前的实现中难以扩展到更大的系统规模，强调需要超越它们，并通过改进编译和单一综合以及运行时错误处理（例如额外的错误抑制、错误检测以及错误纠正方法）来专注于深度减少。这项工作为将数字量子模拟扩展到更复杂的矩阵模型奠定了基础，揭示了量子位资源和电路深度方面的基本挑战仍然是扩展到全息有趣机制的巨大障碍。
